title: Yijing Hexagram 38: Kui (Opposition)
description: Hexagram 38 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 38 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: Opposition. In small matters, good fortune. Above, fire; below, the lake.
